steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Divide by $-2$: $t+7=-19$, then subtract $7$: $t=-26$. The answer is -26.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $-26$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $-26$.
